narrative:
Olmsted Falls-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 658 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points.
